title: Old Dye Textures
description: This texture pack brings back the old dye textures.
body:
Minecraft 1.21.9 changed the textures of all dyes — and honestly, they just don’t look the same anymore.
This pack brings back the **classic dye textures** from previous versions, keeping that familiar **vanilla style** everyone’s used to.

If you preferred the old, clean, and colorful look of dyes, this pack restores them exactly as they were. No fancy edits or style changes — just the **original dye textures** you remember.

**What it does:**
- Reverts all dye item textures to their pre-1.21.9 look.
- Keeps full **vanilla consistency** — blends perfectly with default Minecraft.
- Works with any vanilla-friendly texture pack.

Why download it:

Because the new dyes look off. This pack fixes that without changing anything else in your game.

**Compatibility:**
- Minecraft 1.21.9+
- Works fine with OptiFine, Fabric, Forge, or vanilla clients
- No performance impact

Bring back the **old vibes** — simple, **nostalgic**, and true to Minecraft.
